_modes.active: Human is available. Ask actions flow to Telegram normally.
_modes.away: Human is unavailable. Events below away_auto_allow_threshold proceed. Above threshold: queued. Destructive: halted.
_modes.review: Human has returned. Gate presents queued events summary before resuming normal operation.

availability._comment: Threshold: risk_score < 30 auto-allows in Away mode. 30-79 queued for Review. >= 80 halts agent.

telegram._setup: 1. Create bot via @BotFather, get token. 2. Send /start to bot. 3. Get chat_id via: curl https://api.telegram.org/bot<TOKEN>/getUpdates
